title: Pineapple
description: A mod for QuiltMC's macot: Pineapple
body: [](https://quiltmc.org) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl) [](https://fabricmc.net) [](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) --- Pineapple has arrived to Minecraft. Get yourself Pineapple, the pumpkin to make your worlds 100% better! Pineapple would love to live in your beautiful Minecraft world and go with you adventuring on your head. Features you get with Pineapple: - You can place Pineapple anywhere in your world. - You can wear Pineapple on your head and bring Pineapple to your adventures with you. --- Badges by [Devin](https://github.com/intergrav) and [contributors](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/graphs/contributors).
